Browse Topics Search

Get directions

May 2000
TechnologyInvestigative Methods

The article highlights how online mapping services like MapQuest can assist journalists in finding directions to news story locations quickly and efficiently.

Don't overlook the Net's ability to help you with the most basic of tasks — figuring out where you have to drive to report the story.

MapQuest (at www.mapquest.com) is just one of dozens of mapping sites that can give you directions to that explosion.
